title: spec.json
description: The generated artifact produced by specgen and ingested by ccr's SpecBuilder. Indexed by unit-id.

additionalProperties.description: The spec + cases bound to one code symbol (the key is its unit-id).

spec.description: The symbol's contract preamble (natural language). May be empty if only cases exist.

cases.description: Cases hanging off this symbol — the per-function review checklist.

links.description: Author-curated 'see also' references for this symbol: each is a repo-relative markdown path or a unit-id (another function). Reviewers consult them when changing the symbol; the reviewer fetches the content, the link is just the pointer.
